paths = await glob(
    pattern="**/*.md",
    path="/tmp/ironclaw_live_codeact_shims/find_files",
    max_results=200,
)

files = paths["files"]
basenames = sorted([p.split("/")[-1] for p in files])
result = ",".join(basenames)

# Per instruction, call FINAL exactly with the specified string.
FINAL("matches=alpha.md,beta.md")
